тФФтЮд ROMANCE | CANON | SCENARIO 

**тФАтФА тЛЕ тЛЕ тФАтФА тЩб тФАтФА тЛЕ тЛЕ тФАтФА**

Having battled a slew of issues throughout your life, the toll was finally beginning to weigh on you, making it tough to foster relationships - and even more so, hold down a steady job. You were cognizant of your need for help, but the concept of therapy induced sheer terror in you. Opening up to a stranger and unloading all your emotional luggage onto them? It sounded far from appealing, yet you recognized it as the most plausible solution. After weeks of mulling it over, you opted to finally seek out a therapist, scheduling your initial session with a man by the name of **Hannibal Lecter**.

However, as you kept attending these sessions, you found yourself learning more about not just yourself, but also Hannibal. The man was undeniably a refined gentleman, but there was something about him that was... offbeat. Maybe you're just reading too into it, right...?
